name: CH423 I/O Expander
description: The CH423 component allows you to use the **CH423** I/O expander in ESPHome. It uses an [I²C Bus](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) for communication. The I²C address is not configurable as the CH423 has a separate address for each internal register.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this `ch423` component.
